title: Stavanger, Rogaland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Stavanger, Rogaland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Stavanger is a city in Rogaland with a population of 144,000. Norway’s oil capital, a charming coastal city with white wooden houses, a historic cathedral, and nearby fjords.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
